mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, user_id, status, event_start_date FROM reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
SELECT total_amount FROM payments WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND payment_type = 'DEPOSIT' AND status = 'DONE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY payment_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.status, r.event_start_date FROM reservations r WHERE r.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.reservation_id = r.reservation_id AND p.payment_type = 'BALANCE' AND p.status = 'DONE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL )
